title: RESIDENCY PROGRAM - 211info
text: SAMARITAN HOUSE RESIDENCY PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 10-month transitional living program where residents can establish rental history, receive guidance on education and employment, and access limited child care. Residents are required to deposit at least 60% of their monthly income into a savings account through the organization, which is then used to cover move-in costs when they transition to a new residence. 715 SW Bay Street Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Pregnant women within 14 days of birth or homeless families with dependent children under the age of 18. Parents must have custody of their children at least 50% of the time. Residents must not use drugs or alcohol while completing the program. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm (541) 574-8898 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 574-8898 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: $300 refundable cleaning or damage deposit due at end of first month DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lincoln County Services: Transitional Housing/Shelter * Homeless Families Transitional Housing/Shelter * Pregnant Individuals If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SAMARITAN HOUSE
